title: Journey Titles
description: Lets you add Titles to Areas with Signs
body:
**Want to add Titles to the regions your buint in your map?**

This is a reworked version of the [Original](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/journey-area-title-generator/) Datapack by HopeVox

This Datapack lets you add Titles to Signs and displays them for everyone coming in range.

Craft different tiers of Titles to set the Signs range:

![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09b2b4db75b39353b0c0c7229b3cf7c8b2954738.png)

- Copper Title: 10 Blcoks range
- Iron Title: 20 Blocks range
- Gold Title: 50 Blocks range
- Diamond Title: 100 Blocks range
- Netherite Title: 200 Blocks range

To Create a Title, place a Sign, write something on its front side (the one facing you when placed) and right-klick any of the Titles on that Sign.
You can't place multiple Titles on one Sign.
If the Sign is broken, the Title item you used on it will drop.

If you add glow ink after adding the Title, it will be displayed underlined.

If you can't remember wich Signs have Titles, hold a Title Item and all Signs with Titles on them will display their Title tier as a small block.

This Datapack also supports Titles in the range of other Titles.
The Titles will only be displayed if you enter the range of a specific Title after you have left it.

Since I had to use Integer UUIDs for the Titles, the pack will stop working if you place more than 2147483647 Titles in one World.
